message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title HashedTimelockERC20 contract: normal flow – receiver withdraws with preimage before the timelock expires

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor LightBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor Yellow
  BorderColor Black
}

package "Ethereum Network" as EthereumNetwork {
  participant "«Account»\nSender" as Sender
  participant "«Account»\nReceiver" as Receiver
  participant "«Smart Contract»\nHashedTimelockERC20" as HTLCContract
  participant "«Smart Contract»\nERC20Contract" as ERC20Contract
  participant "Events" as Events
}

note right of HTLCContract
  State stored for each HTLC:
  address sender;
  address receiver;
  address tokenContract;
  uint amount;
  bytes32 hashlock;
  uint timelock; // UNIX ts
  bool withdrawn;
  bool refunded;
  bytes32 preimage;
end note

activate Sender
activate ERC20Contract
Sender -> ERC20Contract : approve(htlc address, amount)
deactivate ERC20Contract
deactivate Sender

activate Sender
activate HTLCContract
Sender -> HTLCContract : newContract(\nreceiver,\nhashlock,\ntimelock,\ntokenContract,\namount\n)
activate ERC20Contract
HTLCContract -> ERC20Contract : transferFrom(sender, htlc address, amount)
deactivate ERC20Contract
HTLCContract -> Events : LogHTLCERC20New(contractId, locks, values, etc.)
HTLCContract -> Sender : contractId
deactivate HTLCContract
deactivate Sender

activate Sender
Sender -> Receiver : reveals contractId
deactivate Sender

activate Receiver
Receiver -> Receiver : knows/obtains secret preimage\n[sha256(secret preimage) == hashlock]
activate HTLCContract
Receiver -> HTLCContract : withdraw(contractId, secret preimage)
activate ERC20Contract
HTLCContract -> ERC20Contract : transfer(receiver, amount)
deactivate ERC20Contract
HTLCContract -> Events : LogHTLCERC20Withdraw(contractId)
deactivate HTLCContract
deactivate Receiver

@enduml
```
